input.initialPrompt: Modernize this project to SDK-style format. Identify all legacy patterns and suggest how to simplify the project file.

data.content:
Here's my analysis of the legacy patterns and the modernized replacement:

**Legacy patterns identified:**

| # | Legacy Pattern | SDK-style Replacement |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace | `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` attribute |
| 2 | Manual `Microsoft.Common.props` import | Implicit via SDK |
| 3 | Explicit `Configuration`/`Platform` defaults | SDK defaults |
| 4 | `ProjectGuid` | Not needed |
| 5 | `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |
| 6 | `FileAlignment` | Default (removable) |
| 7 | `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | Default `true` in SDK |
| 8 | `Deterministic` | Default `true` in SDK |
| 9 | Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` blocks | SDK defaults cover all settings |
| 10 | Explicit `<Reference>` for BCL assemblies | Implicit in SDK-style .NET Framework |
| 11 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | Glob-based auto-inclusion |
| 12 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Properties set in `.csproj` |
| 13 | `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import | Implicit via SDK |

Now I'll apply the modernization:

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a clear picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize it to SDK-style format.

Legacy patterns identified:
1. **XML namespace and ToolsVersion** - `ToolsVersion="15.0"` and `xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003"` → Replace with `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Manual Microsoft.Common.props import** → Handled by SDK automatically
3. **Explicit Configuration/Platform defaults** → SDK defaults handle this
4. **ProjectGuid** → Not needed in SDK-style


5. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** → Becomes `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>`
6. **FileAlignment, AutoGenerateBindingRedirects, Deterministic** → All default to sensible values in SDK-style
7. **Debug/Release PropertyGroups** → SDK handles all the conditional settings like debug symbols, optimization levels, and output paths automatically
8. **System references** → Implicitly available for .NET Framework in SDK-style projects
9. **Compile includes and AssemblyInfo.cs** → SDK globbing auto-includes all C# files, and assembly properties can be configured directly in the project file
10. **Microsoft.CSharp.targets** → Automatically handled by the SDK

Now I'll put together the modernized version.

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>

</Project>

</Project>

data.content:
Done. The project went from **47 lines → 14 lines**. Here's a summary of what was removed/simplified:

- **Boilerplate**: XML declaration, namespace, `ToolsVersion`, imports of `.props`/`.targets` — all handled by `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"`.
- **Debug/Release configs**: SDK provides sensible defaults for `Optimize`, `DefineConstants`, `DebugType`, `OutputPath`, etc.
- **BCL references**: `System`, `System.Core`, etc. are implicit for `net472` in SDK-style.
- **Compile items**: SDK auto-globs all `*.cs` files — no explicit listing needed.
- **AssemblyInfo.cs**: Metadata (`Description`, `Company`, `Copyright`, `Version`) now lives directly in the `.csproj`. The file and `Properties/` directory were deleted.
- **Redundant properties**: `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`, `Deterministic` — all defaults in SDK-style.
